channel.title: Compress on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in Compress on Notities

item.title: Compress photos without quality loss for any platform
item.description:
P.S. Special thanks to Maria Isabel Rondini
She inspired this article as part of the research for her thesis, where she could use some extra attention for the tool ImageCompressor.

Do you want to make your photos smaller in size without losing quality?
Good news: you don’t need to install any software for that!
With the online tool ImageCompressor, you can simply upload your photos and compress them directly in your browser.
That means it doesn’t matter whether you’re working on Windows, Linux, or macOS—as long as you have an internet connection, you can easily compress your photos.
